title: Superior Pack : Standard Edition
description: A modpack that lets you play Minecraft, but more optimized and with fewer bugs!
body:
![Logo](https://imgur.com/D23xrdS.png)

[![Sponsor](https://i.imgur.com/jIArKLy.png)](https://mercurycloud.fr)

# Welcome to Superior Pack !

The goal of this modpack series?
To enhance the gaming experience without degrading the vanilla mode.
You can join your friends or servers, offering a vanilla experience.



## What does this modpack offer?

- ✔️ Visual enhancement
- ✔️ Improved performance
- ✔️ Fix a lot of bugs present in Minecraft
- ✔️ Possibility to use Shader
- ✔️ Create your own server and invite your friends with ease, with "Essential" mod.
- ✔️ Most texture packs that require Optifine are compatible with this modpack.
- ✔️ Shaders can still be used with the "Iris Shaders" mod!



## Who is this modpack for?

This modpack is recommended for everyone, whether you're a beginner or an expert, whether you want to improve game quality without degrading your world or vanilla server
